name: Lemon Scones
recipeIngredient: 1/2 cup (1 stick) unsalted butter, cut into 1/2-inch pieces
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oven to 450°F.
2. Grease and flour baking sheets.
3. Sift flour, sugar, and salt into a deep bowl.
4. Stir in lemon peel.
5. Cut in butter until the mixture resembles coarse meal.
6. Blend in eggs and just enough milk or buttermilk to form soft dough that is not sticky.
7. Turn dough out onto a lightly floured surface.
8. Gently roll or pat dough to about 1/2-inch thickness, flouring as necessary to prevent sticking.
9. Cut rounds using a 2-inch biscuit cutter. Place the rounds 1/2 inch apart on prepared baking sheets.
10. Brush with cream.
11. Bake until scones are golden brown, 12 to 15 minutes.
Bon Appétite
